name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug

---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce

1. Copy this text: `...`
2. Press `Cmd+Shift+C`
3. Paste into `...`
4. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened.

## Environment

- macOS version: [e.g., 14.2]
- Terminal app: [e.g., iTerm2, Terminal.app, Warp, Ghostty]
- ccpaste version: [e.g., 1.0.0]
- Target app: [e.g., Notion, Slack]

## Sample text

If applicable, paste the text that triggers the issue (wrap in a code block).

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots of the paste result.
